name: copilot-bridge
description: Local HTTP bridge from VS Code's Language Model API to external tools such as Python.

copilotBridge.port.description: Localhost port used by the Copilot Bridge server.

copilotBridge.host.description: Host interface bound by the bridge. Keep this on 127.0.0.1 unless you understand the security implications.

copilotBridge.modelFamily.description: Optional Copilot model family selector, for example gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, or claude-3.5-sonnet.

copilotBridge.defaultInstruction.description: Optional instruction prepended as a user message to every request.

copilotBridge.authToken.description: Optional shared secret. When set, callers must send it as X-Copilot-Bridge-Token.

scripts.check: node --check extension.js && env PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp python3 -m py_compile python/copilot_bridge_client.py python/copilot_bridge/client.py python/copilot_bridge/__init__.py
